name: Polenta with Wild Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound white mushrooms, trimmed and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook the mushrooms until golden brown, season with salt and pepper, and keep warm.
2. In a medium saucepan, bring chicken stock or water to a boil. Stir in the corn meal.
3. Reduce heat to a simmer and stir occasionally to prevent lumps from forming.
4. Cook for approximately 30 minutes, tasting periodically until the polenta is thick and smooth without any coarse texture.
5. Stir in butter, grated parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper.
6. Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
